title: memstead-plugin/v0 projection
description: A Projection is the obligation that maps source facets (and optional read-only reference mems) to a single destination mem. Each projection file lives at `.memstead/projections/<mem>/<name>.json`. `source_facets` reference facets by name under the projection's own mem; `reference_mems` supply cross-mem context; `destination_mem` is the mem the projection writes into. The optional `rules` block carries free-form prose guidance the agent reads when running this projection. (The legacy `sources`/`destinations` folder shape was retired with the four-primitive migration.)

intent.description: Optional short statement of what this projection produces.

source_facets.description: Facets (by name, resolved under the projection's own mem) the projection reads from.

reference_mems.description: Read-only reference mems (by name) that supply cross-mem context.

destination_mem.description: The mem this projection writes into.

rules.description: Optional prose guidance for the agent — free-form object.
